summary: Post-refactor regression testing completed. All 55 backend API tests and all frontend smoke tests passed. NO REGRESSIONS found in refactored auth.py, seed.py, or server.py. Auth edge cases (malformed tokens, empty Bearer values) correctly return 401 (not 500). Seed produces exactly 5 programs with correct structure. All server endpoints working identically to pre-refactor state.

backend_issues.notes: All backend tests passed. Auth refactor working perfectly - all edge cases return 401 as expected (not 500).

frontend_issues.notes: All frontend smoke tests passed. Login/logout/re-login flow working correctly.

passed_tests: Backend: 55/55 tests passed (100%)
AUTH: Login with correct credentials returns 200 + JWT token
AUTH: Login with wrong password returns 401
AUTH: Dashboard without Authorization header returns 401 (not 500)
AUTH: Dashboard with malformed/garbage Bearer token returns 401 (not 500)
AUTH: Dashboard with empty Bearer value returns 401
AUTH: Dashboard with valid token returns 200
AUTH: /admin/me with valid token returns 200
SEED: GET /api/programs returns exactly 5 programs with correct structure
SEED: All expected slugs present (tree-plantation-urban-greening, water-conservation, waste-management, community-education, wildlife-habitat-protection)
SEED: All programs have required fields (slug, title, category, summary, description, image_url, gallery, impact_numbers, featured, order)
SERVER: All public endpoints working (settings, blog, gallery, team, testimonials, milestones, careers)
SERVER: Form submissions working (contact, volunteer, partner with honeypot)
SERVER: Newsletter with dedupe working
SERVER: Donations returning MOCK- references
SERVER: Admin CRUD cycle working (create, update, delete)
FRONTEND: Home page renders (hero, stats, programs, president section)
FRONTEND: Programs page shows all 5 programs
FRONTEND: Blog page loads and shows posts
FRONTEND: Admin login with hnes2016@gmail.com / HNES@321 reaches dashboard
FRONTEND: Logout works
FRONTEND: Re-login works
